wikitext.*: {{Infobox Team |name= Diamond Team |orgcountry= Philippines |country= |region=SEA |image= Diamond_Team_logo.png |coaches= |manager= |captain= Mark '''"Shura"''' Ladrera |website= |youtube= |facebook=https://www.facebook.com/pages/Diamond-League-of-Legends/1478543409028770 |twitter= |irc= |sponsor= [[Wargods]] |created=2014-03-08 |disbanded=2015-03-21 |trades= |isdisbanded=yes }} '''Diamond Team''' is a professional League of Legends based in Philippines. == History == == Timeline == {{TDRight |name1=2014 |name2=2015 |content1= * March 8, the roster of [[CMStorm Gaming]] leaves the organization. '''[[Ethan (Ethan Amatong)|Ethan]]''', '''[[Meme]]''', '''[[Naaage]]''', '''[[Ebaaaan]]''', '''[[Marky (Marc Ilagan)|Marky]]''' and '''[[Shura (Mark Eddyson Ladrera)|Shura]]''' join. * April 1, [[Marky (Marc Ilagan)|Marky]] leaves.[https://www.facebook.com/manilaeagles/posts/374264369369124?stream_ref=10 MLE's Facebook Status Update] ''facebook.com'' * December, [[Kyukie]] joins. Diamond Team is sponsored by [[Wargods]] and playing [[2015 GPL Spring]] under the name '''Wargods PID Diamond'''. |content2= * March 21, team disbands. [[Ethan (Ethan Amatong)|Ethan]], [[Meme]], [[Naaage]], [[Ebaaaan]], [[Shura (Mark Eddyson Ladrera)|Shura]], [[Kyukie]] leave.[https://www.facebook.com/permalink.php?story_fbid=1602297229986720&id=1478543409028770 Diamond's Facebook Status Update] ''facebook.com'' }} == Player Roster == ===Former=== {|class="sortable wikitable" ! !ID !Name !Role !Next Team {{listplayer|Ethan (Ethan Amatong)|ph|Ethan Amatong|Top|newteam=none}} {{listplayer|Meme|ph|Merril dela Cruz|Jungle|newteam=none}} {{listplayer|Naaage|ph|Egan Amatong|Mid|newteam=none}} {{listplayer|Ebaaaan|ph|Evan Amatong|AD|newteam=none}} {{listplayer|Shura (Mark Eddyson Ladrera)|ph|Mark Eddyson Ladrera|Support|newteam=none}} {{listplayer|Kyukie|ph||Sub|newteam=none}} {{listplayer|Sel|ph||Jungle|newteam=none}} {{listplayer|Seken|ph||Top|newteam=none}} {{listplayer|link=Marky (Marc Ilagan)|Marky|ph|Marc Ilagan|AD|newteam=mle}} {{Listplayer/EndTemp}} == Organization == == Tournaments == {{TeamResults|show=overviewpage}} {{TeamShowmatchResults|show=overviewpage}} == Highlight Videos == ==Interviews== ==Links== == Images == ==References==
